s-1.ptxt: DISCONNECT CABLE FROM NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL
PLACE FRONT WHEELS FACING STRAIGHT AHEAD

s2.ptxt: Put matchmarks on the steering intermediate shaft assembly and the steering column assembly.
Remove the bolt and the steering intermediate shaft assembly from the steering column assembly.
Remove the cotter pin and the nut.
Using SST, separate the tie rod assembly LH from the steering knuckle.

item.ptxt: Hang SST with a string, etc. to prevent it from falling.
Do not damage the front disc brake dust cover.
Do not damage the ball joint dust cover.
Do not damage the steering knuckle.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT STABILIZER LINK ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 nuts and the front stabilizer link assembly LH.

atten4.ptxt: If the ball joint turns together with the nut, use a hexagon wrench (6 mm) to hold the stud.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT STABILIZER LINK ASSEMBLY RH

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 nuts and the front stabilizer link assembly RH.

atten4.ptxt: If the ball joint turns together with the nut, use a hexagon wrench (6 mm) to hold the stud.
Refer to the instructions for removal of the engine assembly (See page for 2AZ-FE, for 2GR-FE).

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT NO. 1 STABILIZER BRACKET LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 bolts and the front No. 1 stabilizer bracket LH from the front frame assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT NO. 1 STABILIZER BRACKET RH

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 bolts and the front No. 1 stabilizer bracket RH from the front frame assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT NO. 1 STABILIZER BAR BUSHING

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 front No. 1 stabilizer bar bushings from the front stabilizer bar.
